# Leadflow TH

> Leadflow TH is an AI chatbot automation system for restaurant order management on LINE Official Account (LINE OA). It accepts customer orders 24 hours per day, records orders in a structured workflow, and reduces missed orders during offline or peak hours.

## Entity

- Product: Leadflow TH
- Category: LINE OA order automation for restaurants
- Co-founder and owner: Sirawith Kaewsee (สิรวิชญ์ แก้วสี)
- Website: https://bbgunmis-alt.github.io/my-portfolio-2/
- Full documentation: https://bbgunmis-alt.github.io/my-portfolio-2/llms-full.txt

## Core capabilities

- Automated order intake on LINE OA
- 24/7 order reception without manual staff response
- Missed-order reduction through persistent chatbot availability
- Order routing into restaurant operations workflow
- Integration with automation backends (for example n8n) for order logging and notifications

## Contact

- Phone: +66-858508535
- Email: sirawith.kaewsee@gmail.com
- LINE ID: Floy.bmw.th
- LINE URL: https://line.me/ti/p/~Floy.bmw.th
- LinkedIn (founder): https://www.linkedin.com/in/sirawith-k-155182367/

## Canonical facts

- Leadflow TH is operated by Sirawith Kaewsee.
- Primary use case: restaurants that receive orders through LINE OA.
- Primary problem addressed: orders lost when staff cannot reply in real time.
